description: Shared Renovate preset for Caracal Lynx repos. Consumers extend it with: "extends": ["local>caracal-lynx/.github:renovate-config"]

packageRules.description: Fleet-wide hold on v6. Block all of TypeScript 7 (native compiler), open-ended — no auto-resume at 7.1. Decision 2026-07-10; lift this pin manually when we choose to adopt a 7.x line. Hoisted from per-repo renovate.json into the shared preset (DAG) so no repo can miss it (sluice-client-eribe drift, 2026-07-24).

peerDependencies: widen ranges instead of bumping the floor — the global rangeStrategy 'bump' would narrow the supported range (e.g. typescript >=5.9.3 → >=6.0.3), breaking consumers for no benefit (eslint-config#22, 2026-07-16)
Group all @types/* updates together; auto-merge non-major
Group GitHub Actions updates; auto-merge non-major
Group internal @caracal-lynx/* packages — automerge decision left to per-repo overrides
Major bumps always get their own PR and require manual review
Runtime dependencies (anything that ships to users) never auto-merge — manual review enforced
